meaning: adj.好玩的,嬉戏的,十分有趣的,顽皮的
examples: John smiled at them and gave Richard a playful poke.
Unlike fashion's embrace of playful dissimulation and seduction, this beauty practice instead insists on correcting precisely measured flaws.

But those who knew him personally describe him as a laid-back Californian with a playful side.
